allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas, numpy; print\('pandas', pandas.__version__, '| numpy', numpy.__version__\)")

PowerShell($py = "env\\Scripts\\python.exe"; if \(Test-Path $py\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $py"; & $py --version; & $py -c "import pandas, numpy; print\('pandas', pandas.__version__, 'numpy', numpy.__version__\)"; & $py -c "import pyreadstat; print\('pyreadstat OK'\)"; & $py -c "import matplotlib; print\('matplotlib OK'\)" } else { Write-Output "no env/Scripts/python.exe"; Get-ChildItem env -Depth 1 | Select-Object -First 20 Name })

PowerShell($py = "env\\python.exe"; if \(Test-Path $py\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $py"; & $py --version; & $py -c "import pandas,numpy; print\('pandas',pandas.__version__,'numpy',numpy.__version__\)"; & $py -c "import pyreadstat; print\('pyreadstat',pyreadstat.__version__\)" 2>&1; & $py -c "import matplotlib; print\('matplotlib OK'\)" 2>&1; & $py -c "import pyarrow; print\('pyarrow OK'\)" 2>&1 } else { Write-Output "not at root either" })
PowerShell(& "env\\python.exe" -c "import matplotlib, pyarrow; print\('matplotlib', matplotlib.__version__, '| pyarrow', pyarrow.__version__\)")
PowerShell(& "env\\python.exe" -m pip install --quiet nbformat nbclient ipykernel 2>&1)
PowerShell(& "env\\python.exe" -c "import nbformat, nbclient, ipykernel; print\('notebook tooling OK'\)")
PowerShell(& "env\\python.exe" -c "import sklearn, scipy; print\('sklearn', sklearn.__version__, '| scipy', scipy.__version__\)" 2>&1)
